stimulus: A glancing summary of Yinka Shonibare's 2010 installation Nelson's Ship in a Bottle can make the work seem ______blank—a sculpture that consists of a scaled-down Royal Navy vessel inside a glass bottle may sound merely decorative—but in fact the work is a layered, provocative meditation on imperialism and identity that demands sustained attention.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. "Slight" most logically completes the text. The text contrasts a casual summary of the work (which makes it sound "merely decorative") with its actual depth. "Slight" means trivial or lacking substance—the impression the summary would give.

Choice A is incorrect. "Pretentious" means putting on airs of importance, which doesn't match "merely decorative." Choice B is incorrect. "Shrewd" means cleverly perceptive—a positive quality the summary wouldn't naively impart. Choice D is incorrect. "Incongruous" means out of place; the summary makes the work sound inoffensive and minor, not jarring.
